description: Single preset entrypoint for the SCOPE Image Orchestrator: all route presets, distilled control templates, and route-level source notes are kept in one file.

global_rules.negative_anchor: Negative: no repeated gibberish text, no random paragraph blocks, no watermark, no CGI-plastic skin, no unrealistic anatomy.
global_rules.short_prompt_english_only: Keep final production prompts in compact clean English.
text_principles: Prefer concrete camera/light/material controls before abstract adjectives.
Use 2-4 concrete scene anchors and include one controllable texture anchor.
Put hard constraints in negative_prompt and keep the positive prompt compact.
Add route-specific detail only when user intent is underspecified.
global_rules.model_comparison_note: Prompt optimization stays deterministic, compact, and parseable for unstable endpoints.
global_rules.external_library_usage: Public prompt inspirations are distilled to scene/camera/material composition controls; never copy full third-party prompts verbatim.

portrait.route_hint: editorial or lifestyle portrait route with explicit person identity anchors, realistic skin/hair/fabric texture, candid body language, and practical imperfections.
portrait.fallback_prompt: Photorealistic 2:3 vertical editorial portrait, adult subject: {subject}. {camera_phrase}, practical scene anchor: {style_blocks}, realistic skin variation and natural light falloff.
portrait.camera_phrase: 85mm portrait lens, practical indoor/window light, natural falloff and skin-friendly exposure
portrait.negative: Negative: no cartoon look, no beauty-filter face, no plastic skin, no repeated random text, no watermark.
booster_lines: one clear identity anchor and one nearby environment detail
add natural hand and shoulder asymmetry; keep pose imperfect but balanced
skin microtexture with visible pores, subtle oil sheen, and believable imperfections
style_blocks: real photography with 35/50/85mm style framing
soft practical key light with natural shadow falloff
body and hand micro-asymmetry for candid motion
composition_patterns: vertical portrait framing with clear subject focus
face and hands stay in one coherent composition plane
external_patterns: phone-candid realism with mild imperfections
soft realistic falloff from practical key light
editorial lifestyle look with real-life texture
quality_controls: face integrity: no distortion, realistic jaw/chin structure
anatomy integrity: realistic shoulder and neck alignment
texture integrity: pores, fibers, fine skin micro-shine visible

magazine.route_hint: high-fashion or luxury magazine cover route with layout-first composition and clear typographic hierarchy.
magazine.fallback_prompt: Photorealistic 2:3 high-fashion magazine cover, adult model: {subject}. Layout-first masthead, short readable cover lines, issue badge/number, practical high-end studio light.
magazine.camera_phrase: high-contrast 85mm editorial look with controlled paper-like contrast
magazine.light_phrase: cool ambient plus warm key with print-quality tonal separation
magazine.negative: Negative: no repeated text paragraphs, no fake logos unless requested, no gibberish blocks, no random letters, no watermark, no minors.
booster_lines: avoid long unreadable text and repeated random glyphs
place issue marker clearly without covering face
keep title and subtitles short and legible
limit total text density to one coherent editorial block
composition_patterns: 2:3 vertical cover grid
one headline zone, one subtitle zone, one badge/number zone
external_patterns: clean magazine rhythm with model-over-title composition
high-contrast type with controlled print contrast
no fake brand logos unless explicitly requested
quality_controls: text hierarchy is readable and short
no gibberish glyph clusters
masthead/lines/issue marker remain separated
no logo/issue marker overlap with face
style_blocks: cover-first typography hierarchy: masthead, headline, subtitle, badge
short readable Japanese/English title phrases only
clean negative space and print-ready contrast

poster.route_hint: cinematic key-art poster route with hero-first focus, atmosphere, and readable text hierarchy.
poster.fallback_prompt: Cinematic 2:3 movie-poster key art, based on: {subject}. Hero focus center-forward, one practical prop, readable title zone, short tagline, compact credits block, controlled depth and atmosphere.
poster.camera_phrase: cinematic composition with clear foreground-midground-background separation
poster.light_phrase: cold/warm split palette with practical contrast and subtle haze
poster.negative: Negative: no repeated title, no fake logos unless requested, no unreadable clutter, no random text, no watermark.
booster_lines: readable title and tagline size must remain prominent
avoid poster-noise textures and random overlays
keep composition readable at thumbnail scale
composition_patterns: one hero anchor + one support anchor + readable environment cue
title and tagline placed in clear negative-space zones
external_patterns: light-driven mood direction with practical reflections
rain/smoke/fog only as plausible atmosphere
genre palette remains controlled and simple
quality_controls: title/credits must remain legible
hero focus remains dominant
no unreadable clutter around text blocks
style_blocks: cinematic hero composition with compact title zone
one title line + one short tagline only
light hierarchy from hard key source and controlled haze

interior.route_hint: architectural interior visualization route: physical geometry, scale, and material truth first.
interior.fallback_prompt: Photorealistic architectural interior visualization: {subject}. Eye-height {camera_phrase}, realistic circulation path, proper room geometry and furniture scale. Materials with wood grain, fabric weave, stone veining, glass reflections and realistic shadow behavior.
interior.negative: Negative: no warped furniture, no impossible perspective, no melted materials, no extra doors/windows, no people unless requested, no watermark.
booster_lines: keep scale anchors every 2-3 meters (sofa, table, lamp)
reflective surfaces use realistic intensity and roughness
avoid warped furniture edges or impossible openings
material boundaries and edge contacts remain physically plausible
show one clear circulation route and one lighting source
style_blocks: camera should show circulation and room function
one architectural style cue with 3-5 scale objects
soft practical light with ambient bounce
composition_patterns: room-first layout, then materials, then props
clean edges and physically plausible openings
quality_controls: straight verticals and stable vanishing geometry
consistent room proportions and object scale
glass/stone/metal reflections match material roughness and light angle
external_patterns: physical composition-first layout then materials and props
soft practical bounce lighting
no duplicated furniture or distorted edges

product.route_hint: commercial packshot route: one hero product, realistic material, clean support geometry.
product.fallback_prompt: Photorealistic commercial product still life of {subject}. One hero object, controlled reflections, realistic shadow, clean background, 1 hero + 2-3 scale helpers.
product.negative: Negative: no duplicate hero object, no warped logo/label, no random label text, no clutter, no watermark.
booster_lines: single hero item remains dominant, no competing objects
real material boundaries for glass/ceramic/metal
no edge distortion on labels or bottle rims
composition_patterns: hero object, contact shadow, controlled support props
one clean light direction and readable negative space
external_patterns: macro-level material response for edges, seams, glass, fabric
keep background minimal and neutral
clean silhouette with controlled highlights
quality_controls: contact shadows are coherent
reflections are physically plausible
single hero focus and readable label shape

bathroom.route_hint: smartphone mirror selfie route in hotel or compact apartment bathroom, real lifestyle intimacy without heavy pose directives.
bathroom.fallback_prompt: Photorealistic 9:16 smartphone mirror selfie. Adult subject in hotel or compact apartment bathroom, private-lifestyle feel, one hand holding phone, one hand adjusting expression or clothes naturally. Slight 26mm asymmetry, mirror edge visible, realistic tile/glass/chrome surfaces.
bathroom.camera_phrase: 26mm equivalent smartphone perspective, slightly asymmetrical handheld framing, mild sensor grain
bathroom.negative: Negative: no wet or transparent shirt, no stock-photo posture, no influencer pose, no sexual poses, no watermark, no minors.
booster_lines: mirror reflection must follow realistic phone geometry
include at least two concrete bathroom anchors (towel, tile, towel rack, toiletries, chrome faucet)
one hand and one face adjustment action for candidness
fabric folds and collar texture should read softly
style_blocks: modern hotel or compact apartment bathroom
half-body or three-quarter mirror selfie, phone-crop asymmetry
warm vanity lights plus neutral fill; no harsh studio look
white shirt optional, loose sleeves or loose collar for tactile fabric motion
composition_patterns: lifestyle realism first, cover-style layout second
clean frame with one subject and mirror edge, no editorial title blocks
external_patterns: real shower/vanity/ceramic context with subtle environmental cues
porcelain and glass reflections physically consistent
no exaggerated anatomy or unrealistic hand distortion
quality_controls: mirror edge readable and geometrically aligned
phone perspective feels handheld and casual
no stiff pose; natural shoulder/hand asymmetry

cosplay.route_hint: live-action character or cosplay route: preserve identity anchors and convert costume texture to real materials.
cosplay.fallback_prompt: Photorealistic 2:3 live-action character styling shot, inspired by: {subject}. Keep one hairstyle, one signature accessory, and one costume anchor. Realistic costume texture with visible seams, embroidery, fabric tension, leather and metal balance.
cosplay.camera_phrase: practical mixed light, subtle handheld movement, controlled depth and mild imperfection
cosplay.negative: Negative: no anime render, no CGI skin, no cheap costume materials, no random text, no explicit sexual pose, no watermark, no minors.
booster_lines: preserve one identity anchor and one costume material anchor
costume fabric/metal should have realistic weight, seams, and edge behavior
face/eyes maintain human asymmetry and natural expression
pose keeps body weight and shoulder shift
composition_patterns: hero stance with one clear action line
realistic face/body proportion and weight shift
supporting set reinforces character context
external_patterns: human-like skin texture and believable hair strands
practical mixed light, no toy-like plastic shine
costume detail prioritized over unreal effects
quality_controls: costume texture looks non-CGI and material-dense
no obvious expression rigidity
hair strands and metal/cloth transitions remain coherent

idiom_cinema.route_hint: stylized Chinese-cinema tableau route for mythic or idiom-driven scenes: low saturation, controlled theatrical staging, dramatic action silhouette, and 1980s film texture.
idiom_cinema.fallback_prompt: Stylized cinematic tableau inspired by a Chinese idiom or myth: {subject}. Low-saturation palette, black or near-black background, dramatic low-angle composition, shallow depth of field, selective motion blur, and tactile 1980s film-grain realism.
idiom_cinema.camera_phrase: low-angle wide lens with exaggerated perspective and foreground blur
idiom_cinema.light_phrase: theatrical contrast with restrained color and localized practical highlights
idiom_cinema.negative: Negative: no flat poster layout, no cartoon simplification, no oversaturated neon, no random text, no watermark, no plastic faces or melted anatomy.
booster_lines: treat the frame like a staged film still, not a poster board
preserve one decisive symbolic prop and one dynamic gesture
use low saturation, deep blacks, and selective practical highlights
foreground blur and motion streaks should enhance story tension, not hide anatomy
style_blocks: Chinese cinematic tableau with myth/idiom storytelling focus
black or near-black environment with controlled practical detail
1980s film-camera texture, shallow depth, dramatic perspective exaggeration
composition_patterns: one mythic action beat or symbolic gesture dominates the frame
foreground blur + midground subject + sparse but meaningful background cue
silhouette readability stays strong at thumbnail size
external_patterns: low-saturation art-film mood with tactile grain
dynamic low-angle staging and selective motion blur
prop-driven symbolism instead of decorative clutter
quality_controls: subject anatomy remains readable despite motion and blur
one symbolic prop and one decisive action remain clear
black background still contains controlled depth cues and separation

documentary.route_hint: documentary or candid reportage route: real-camera feel, off-center composition, cool-natural tonality, and scene credibility before spectacle.
documentary.fallback_prompt: Photorealistic documentary-style scene: {subject}. Real-camera capture feel, off-center composition, natural lens imperfections, cool or neutral tonality, story-first environmental detail, and believable human/material texture.
documentary.camera_phrase: observational handheld or practical still-photography framing
documentary.negative: Negative: no poster composition, no glamour retouching, no centered brochure layout, no random text, no fake UI, no waxy skin, no watermark.
booster_lines: prioritize one believable story beat over spectacle
keep the subject slightly off-center with foreground or edge occlusion
allow minor lens imperfection, natural blur falloff, and candid body language
environmental evidence should explain the scene without overfilling the frame
style_blocks: BBC/reportage realism with candid observational distance
ordinary camera look, not commercial poster polish
cool-neutral grade with tactile real-world clutter kept under control
composition_patterns: non-centered subject placement with environmental storytelling
foreground soft obstruction or edge blur allowed when it improves realism
one strong action or interaction anchors the scene
external_patterns: award-photo composition rather than ad composition
human texture and lived-in materials over glossy stylization
credible microdrama captured mid-action
quality_controls: scene should read as a real captured moment, not staged poster art
faces/hands/materials remain grounded and non-waxy
background clutter supports narrative without dominating subject

strategy_overhead.route_hint: top-down strategy or miniature god-view route: readable units, terrain logic, high-end game-render look, and no UI overlay.
strategy_overhead.fallback_prompt: High-end top-down strategy scene: {subject}. God-view or steep overhead perspective, readable unit silhouettes, terrain hierarchy, cinematic game-render realism, and zero interface elements.
strategy_overhead.camera_phrase: steep overhead or isometric strategy-camera framing
strategy_overhead.negative: Negative: no UI, no HUD, no minimap, no menu text, no poster title, no muddy unreadable crowding, no toy-like proportions unless requested.
booster_lines: every major unit group should remain readable from a distance
terrain and props should support gameplay logic and scale comprehension
keep spectacle secondary to tactical silhouette clarity
avoid clutter that obscures command paths or focal conflict
style_blocks: UE5/PS5-scale real-time strategy presentation without interface
high-end lighting and terrain readability from overhead view
miniature war-table or battlefield legibility with cinematic rendering
composition_patterns: one main conflict cluster plus secondary support clusters
clear terrain lanes, fortifications, or environmental boundaries
visual hierarchy remains legible at map-like viewing distance
external_patterns: overhead strategy readability first, spectacle second
rendered like a premium game screenshot without HUD
micro-unit silhouettes and terrain scale remain coherent
quality_controls: units do not melt into terrain at distance
no fake UI or menu artifacts appear
camera angle clearly communicates top-down tactical view

anime_cel.route_hint: clean cel-shaded anime character or concept route: simple structure, readable silhouette, restrained texture complexity, and polished flat-shaded rendering.
anime_cel.fallback_prompt: Clean cel-shaded anime concept of {subject}. Full-body or key-shot silhouette, restrained detail density, elegant shape design, polished line economy, and flat-shaded premium animation finish.
anime_cel.camera_phrase: full-body concept framing or clean medium shot with silhouette priority
anime_cel.negative: Negative: no oil painting texture, no thick painterly smears, no muddy gradients, no random typography, no 3D plastic skin, no overdesigned accessories.
booster_lines: favor strong silhouette and shape language over tiny texture detail
keep material rendering clean and cel-shaded, not painterly
use controlled accent details rather than busy ornament everywhere
pose and costume structure must read clearly in one glance
style_blocks: premium cel-shaded anime finish with disciplined detail density
shape-first character design with clean value separation
animation-studio presentation rather than poster typography
composition_patterns: full-body turnaround-like clarity or one clean hero pose
clear contour breaks and controlled negative space
costume props do not overwhelm body readability
external_patterns: MAPPA-like cleanliness without copying any exact IP style
flat-shaded premium animation surfaces
minimal but intentional structure changes and accent shapes
quality_controls: silhouette remains readable at thumbnail size
no muddy gradient banding or pseudo-oil textures
proportions stay intentional and stable

external_prompt_sources.note: Source prompt libraries were reviewed as public inspiration and distilled; raw prompt bodies and URLs are intentionally omitted.
distilled_bundles: public internet prompt collections for editorial / product / lifestyle scenes
public prompt examples from Infinite Canvas prompt boards
user-supplied SSS0625 prompt corpus distilled into category-level controls only

optimizer_guides.prompt_presets_md:
# Prompt Presets

Use route presets as compact inspiration only. Keep final prompts concise, concrete, and suitable for the selected route. Do not copy any third-party prompt bodies verbatim.
optimizer_guides.prompt_optimizer_compact_md:
# Prompt Optimizer Compact Guide

Return one compact production prompt plus concise negatives. Prefer explicit control terms: subject, scene, composition, camera, lighting, material, and exclusions.
optimizer_guides.prompt_optimizer_engineering_md:
# Prompt Optimizer Engineering Guide

Classify the request, preserve user constraints, choose one route, synthesize a compact prompt, and avoid long nested JSON-like prose unless explicitly requested.
optimizer_guides.external_prompt_patterns_md:
# External Prompt Pattern Notes

Public examples are used only as high-level inspiration. Keep distilled controls and avoid redistributing original prompt libraries.

source_prompt_cache_summary.note: Public prompt examples were distilled into route controls. Full third-party prompt bodies are intentionally omitted.
source_prompt_cache_summary.policy: Do not include verbatim third-party prompt bodies or private caches in this repository.

open_source_notice: Most preset ideas are distilled from public internet prompt libraries and examples, then normalized into route-level controls; they are not intended as verbatim copies.
image_model_prompting_influence: explicit scene + subject + lens + material order
short constraints in positives, long ones in negatives
for unstable endpoints, keep final prompt compact under 900-1100 chars

core_idea: replace mood words with measurable controls
split prompt into scene, lens, material, and composition blocks
for human scenes, add capture imperfections before beauty adjectives
for commercial scenes, keep one primary hero and 2-3 support anchors
distilled_from_infinite_canvas_sources: treat prompt as physical shot plan
separate subject, environment, lens, light, material, and post-processing
prefer practical micro-details over abstract adjectives

inference_pipeline_note: The runtime prompt optimizer receives only compact distilled controls from this library; no full upstream prompts are passed through.
